description_long: This is a stilted wooden house with a large, steeply pitched gable roof, elevated above the ground on multiple sturdy posts. The exterior walls are clad in dark brown wooden planks, and the roof is covered with matching wooden shingles. The house features a prominent front staircase leading up to a small landing, providing access to the main entrance. Small, shuttered windows are symmetrically placed on the front facade, while the sides and rear are more enclosed with minimal openings. The structure is simple and functional, with a utilitarian design suited for flood-prone or rural environments. The overall appearance is rustic, with an emphasis on practicality and durability.
description: A rustic, stilted wooden house with a steep gable roof, front staircase, and small shuttered windows. The structure is elevated on posts and features dark brown wood throughout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, staircase, and two small shuttered windows on the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full width of the gable roof and the central staircase leading up to the house.
description_view_2: Rear angled view similar to the front, but with the staircase and landing visible on the left side.
description_view_3: Back view showing the plain rear wall and the full expanse of the roof, with no visible windows or doors.
attribute_entryway_design: Elevated entry with a straight staircase, small landing, and simple wooden door; no porch or decorative elements.
